metadata.description: bureau — turn AI sessions into a maintained, human-reviewed knowledge base, by xiaolai

plugins.name: bureau
plugins.description: Turn AI sessions into a maintained, human-reviewed knowledge base: capture sessions to append-only logbooks, compile into consistency-checked dossiers gated by trust tiers (proposed → verified → canonical), query the canon tier-aware, and render it as a navigable offline gazette (built by the bundled press). A deterministic recursion engine tracks claim-level dependencies (rests_on + author-anchored spans) via an append-only decision log, per-span revisions, an early-cutoff gate, and an fsck byte-fixpoint. Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern + session provenance + a human review gate. Self-contained — no separate install.
